description.value:
Your strange singing voice can cause a moment's reconsideration or hesitation. Attempt a @Check[performance|against:will] check against the Will DC of a target within 30 feet. The target then becomes temporarily immune to your Pahtra Caterwaul for 24 hours.

Critical Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} as long as it's frightened.

Success The target becomes frightened 1.
